feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP User Administration and Authorization Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Deploy from VSCode to ABAP on-prem fails with timeout...
entry.content:
Hi pbstl1,

not sure if this could help: Are you behind a corporate proxy? In my case there was some proxy configuration for npm in the .npmrc file to use avoid npm certificate issues. As far I know VS-Code uses this npm config too.

After delete the config I could deploy my application on system.

I know you have timeout issues but maybe this could help?

Best regards Timo

entry.title: Unit link content in "Side-by-Side Extensibility Based on SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime" broken
entry.content:
Hello,

I am doing the learning journey "Side-by-Side Extensibility Based on SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime". In the Unit 5, "Using Service Meshes with Istio", the link for the content "Using Istio" is broken, Could you fix it or help me?

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/deliver-side-by-side-extensibility-based-on-sap-btp-kyma-runtime/using-istio_e6d12146-f641-4184-9045-c6ccf5ea4344

Thanks.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: RAP - Page size overrun: Query implementation of 'ZI_ZVOML_CUST' returned too many records
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm experiencing the same issue. I'm doing what Andre pointed out previously and I've also set the top on the request:

IF top > 0 .
read_list_request->set_top( top ).
ENDIF.

read_list_request->set_skip( skip ).

However, I'm still having issues. It seems that the top does nothing (I'm inserting 20 rows in top and still get more) and because of that I still get an error.

Any ideas?

Rafael

entry.title: How to disable planning for a Dimension Property values
entry.content: I have dimension property named Status. This Status has active and inactive as its values. We are using Status as filter where we want to show both active and inactive values in a forecast table but the inactive values should be planning disable. Is there a possibility to achieve this? (Tried using styling but not working)

entry.title: Re: Unit link content in "Side-by-Side Extensibility Base...
entry.content:
It is working again.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: How to execute data action from Jan of Current year a...
entry.content: If the data action is to be triggered from story by user, you maybe can try to get the current year in story via JavaScript coding and pass the year value as parameter to data action via trigger API, in the advance formula you can simply use normal MEMBERSET expression like below: MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM] , %Period% )

entry.title: Public cloud interface development
entry.content:
Dear Experties,
Please let us know any restrictions and limitations for S4H Public Cloud to connect from outside systems on the private network domain on AWS.

Currently we are doing the initial customer assessmnet, it's seemed to be "Discovery", then we are aware that the customer develop a lot of application systems on their own AWS network domain, and we are going to make interface between S4H Cloud, Public.

I supposed wether we could hvae any option to deploy S/4HANA Cloud could on the private domain on AWS.

Please kindly share your information, knowledge and experiences.

Regards,
Takashi

entry.title: Can One Domain Model be used without Master Data Integration Service?
entry.content:
Hello,

For replication of master data we are trying out another approach where in we call the remote service/API directly without any middleware, thus eliminating the use of Master Data Integration Service. In this scenario can we make use of the One Domain Model without MDI Service?

Kind regards,

Shreya

entry.title: Scope ID 40Y Intercompany Reconciliation will not help to clear the items like Automatic Clearing
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using Scope ID 40Y Intercompany Reconciliation in SAP Cloud system. We have followed every step given by SAP, steps followed given below:
1. Scheduled Matching Run Job 2. Reconciliation Status Overview (Display) 3. Reconciliation Balances (Display) 4. Manage Assignments - By Reconciliation Case( Here we automatched few items and assigned few items manually by giving reason code which are missed in Job) 5. Display Matching Items 6. Manage Reconciliation Close

We did all above steps, here what we observed was the items which are matched automatically system is creating assignment numbers, but it is not clearing open items like what Automatic Clearing is doing. Can anyone confirm 40Y will not help to clear the items like Automatic Clearing?

Thanks
Naveen Kumar

entry.title: Re: Multiple Table header rows in sapUi5
entry.content:
Hello,

You can use sap.ui.table.

This table has multi header property.Check this;

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.table.Table/sample/sap.ui.table.sample.MultiHeader 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Break Fix for Productive Processes?
entry.content:
Hi Brad,

thanks for your valid question. One remark before giving my recommendation: think of "scope" as something that can last longer than a phase or even project in the long run. Scope could combine all processes of e.g. central finance and the releases and timeboxes are used to show what is implemented when as part of the project.

Regarding your customer situation: switch the status of the solution processes to "Maintenance", but keep them in the same scope. now you can assign new requirements, user stories, tasks, documents and test cases to the process. The new requirements and tasks can be assigned to new timeboxes (or releases if you use them for feature release) to manage them. for test cases you can bundle them in test plans and ad them as well to the relevant timebox. 

I hope this helps you. 

Best Regards,

Sinje

entry.title: Re: Problem with nativescript plugin when deploying
entry.content: I listed the plugin in the remote extension and it work thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to handle the dynamic parallel workflow task in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hello!

Interesting topic! But I was wondering, what about dynamic parallelization? In the case we have to send an approval request to 3 approvers (at the same time, so we don't have to wait for the first one approve to move to the next), how could we manage this?

Thank you!
Rafael

entry.title: Re: Upgrade : From SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 Sp10 to SAP BW/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hi Kiran

I would suggest to check these:

Product Availability Matrix:

  • SAP BW/4HANA 2023

Upgrade guide:

  • SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Master Guide

Consulting notes:

  • 3365187 - Information/Restriction Note for Release SAP BW/4HANA 2023
  • 2733740 - Release Information/Restrictions Note for SAP BW/4HANA 2.0
  • 2421930 - Simplification List for SAP BW/4HANA
  • 1944835 - SAP BW Modeling Tools - Delivery Schedule

 

br

Roland

entry.title: List of Pricing Apps in SAP S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi  SAP HANA Experts,

I am looking for List of SAP Hana Sales Relevant Pricing Apps.

Example - I can see a thread for Sales order Management view App( https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/list-with-9-sap-s-4-hana-fiori-apps-for-analysis-and-reports-sales-sd/ba-p/13497182 )  and this is very clear to me to understand how many of useful Apps available Under ' Sales Order Management'  .

So, Looking for List of Pricing Apps to explore more in SAP Fiori.  Please help!! Thanks in advance.

Thanks

Sj

entry.title: Navigation Property is not created in Service Binding using association
entry.content:
Hello 🙂

I created a CDS view using view entity. The view selects from a database table and associates with another CDS view, that selects from another database table.

The database tables are connected using foreign keys. 

After exposing the CDS view in the service definition I would expect the service binding to show up the navigation property. But this does not appear.

CDS view with association

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Terminvarianten für Plabo'
define root view entity ZI_PLABO_DATVAR
  as select from zplabo_datvar
  association [0..1] to ZC_PLABO_Variant     as _variant     on  _variant.Variant = zplabo_datvar.variant
  association [0..*] to ZI_PLABO_DATVARSTP   as _datVarStep  on  $projection.variant = _datVarStep.plabo_variant
  association [1..1] to ZI_PLABO_DEFAULTICON as _defaultIcon on  $projection.variant     = _defaultIcon.variant
                                                             and $projection.date_variant = _defaultIcon.date_variant
                                                             and $projection.is_default     = _defaultIcon.is_default
{
  key variant,
  key date_variant,
      name,
      is_default,
      created_by,
      _variant,
      _datVarStep,
      _defaultIcon
}

CDS projection view

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Terminvarianten für Plabo'
define root view entity ZC_PLABO_DATVAR
  provider contract transactional_query
  as projection on ZI_PLABO_DATVAR

{
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'PlaboVariantName' ]
  key variant                    as PlaboVariantId,
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'TerminVariantName' ]
  key date_variant               as TerminVariantId,
      name                       as TerminVariantName,
      is_default                 as IsDefault,
      created_by                 as CreatedBy,
      _variant.VariantName       as PlaboVariantName,
      _datVarStep,
      _defaultIcon.IsDefaultIcon as DefaultIcon
}

 Service definition:

@EndUserText.label: 'Service Definition für Termin-Varianten'
define service ZPLABO_DATVARS {
  expose ZC_PLABO_DATVAR as PlaboTerminVariante;
  expose ZC_PLABO_DATVARSTP as PlaboTerminVarianteStep;
}

Service binding:

 

There should be a navigation property from PlaboTerminVariante to PlaboTerminVarianteStep, propably called to_PlaboTerminVarianteStep. 


What am I missing?

 

Thank you already in advance.

Kind regards, 
Simon

entry.title: Re: Upgrade : From SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 Sp10 to SAP BW/4HANA...
entry.content: Thank you Roland for sharing the links

entry.title: Should we move away from the main Analysis for Office tools in favour of the SAC Excel Addin?
entry.content:
The main AO tools are still supported until at least 2029 according to the PAM. But instead of AO, should we be opting for the SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Addin (365) as soon as is practical?

We currently use AO for both BW on prem reporting and some S4 on prem reporting (via CDS views). But the move to Datasphere (with SAC) is approaching and with that it will only be possible to deliver excel based reporting (based on Analytic Models) via SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Addin. 

So should we use both tools or try to push everything down the SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Addin?

A single tool would be preferable but I'm not sure if SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Addin is quite ready.

entry.title: Implement a standard fiori application on System ECC 6.0 EHP8
entry.content:
Hi all, I need to implement a standard fiori application ("approve purchase orders"), but I have some doubts about my components and the ones I need to install.

attached an image of the features that fiori library indicates to install :

 

and attached, the features that I have installed:

my doubts are the following:
is it problematic that I have EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 - 08 (10/2017) FP installed when in fiori library says that I should have EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 - SPS 03 (08/2016) FP ?
on the other hand, fiori library asks to install 2 software components (SAP_APPL 618 - SP 0003 / GBAPP002 600 - SP 0012) and I only have SAP_APPL 618 - SP 0008. (it has SP 0008, not SP 0003).
So, should I install GBAPP002 600 - SP 0012, and regarding SAP_APPL 618 there would be no problem if it is SP 0008?

I look forward to hearing from you, best regards.

entry.title: Re: List of Pricing Apps in SAP S/4 Hana
entry.content: Easiest way to identify apps is to check here - https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/
